step.name: authenticate
step.action: Fetch OAuth token from Adobe IMS; cache TTL.

step.name: brand-lint-prompts
step.action: Run pre-filter; reject prompts that hit forbidden terms or miss required ones.

step.name: submit-batch
step.action: POST to /v3/images/generate; collect job ids; poll until complete.

step.name: attach-provenance
step.action: Fetch Content Credentials manifest; store prompt hash + model version alongside asset.

step.name: alt-text-pass
step.action: Generate draft alt-text from prompt; queue for human approval.

step.name: publish
step.action: Move to destination bucket; emit audit log.
